channel.title: Comments on: Left Hand Brewing: Milk Stout Nitro, Ep. 183
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description:
Thanks, Pink, for the detail behind nitro. It's the best explanation I've heard, and it didn't take that long at all.
Keep it up, guys!
item.content:encoded:
Thanks, Pink, for the detail behind nitro. It’s the best explanation I’ve heard, and it didn’t take that long at all.

Keep it up, guys!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/left-hand-brewing-milk-stout-nitro-183/comment-page-1/#comment-1793">Will Raymond</a>.
No no my friend...you rock for watching! :)
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Will Raymond.

No no my friend…you rock for watching! 🙂

item.title: By: Will Raymond
item.dc:creator: Will Raymond
item.description: Love it! You guys rock... I know nothing about beer, but will always be a fan of Beer America! -Will-
item.content:encoded:
Love it! You guys rock… I know nothing about beer, but will always be a fan of Beer America!
-Will-
